meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SEO for SaaS: A Freelancer’s Guide to Solving Marketing Gaps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Use this intermediate checklist to automate SEO for SaaS projects using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance business.
content.answer_block: Transform your SaaS from a ghost town into a lead magnet by automating SEO. Use Antigravity to architect high-intent content clusters and Claude Code to refactor your codebase for technical SEO compliance. This systematic approach replaces manual marketing efforts with high-leverage code that drives organic traffic while you sleep.
content.intro:
You’ve built a masterpiece of software, yet the metrics dashboard remains flat. The silence of a launch without a marketing engine is the freelancer’s greatest nightmare—you have the technical prowess to ship, but the lack of marketing skills leaves your SaaS invisible in a crowded market. You don't need a massive ad budget; you need an automated, technical SEO strategy.

By treating your marketing like a deployment pipeline, you can turn your SaaS into an organic traffic machine. We are moving beyond manual blogging and into the era of programmable authority. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, we will bake SEO into the foundation of your product, ensuring Google finds you while you focus on the next feature request.

steps.title: Keyword Intent Mapping
steps.description: Identify high-intent long-tail keywords that signal a user is ready for a SaaS solution. We map these to your landing page structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 10 competitors for [SaaS Niche]. Generate a table of 20 high-intent, low-difficulty long-tail keywords. Map each to a specific landing page H1 and meta description.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a JSON schema for a landing page content structure based on the provided keyword clusters.'

steps.title: Technical SEO Audit
steps.description: Ensure your stack is crawlable. We fix rendering issues and metadata injection to satisfy search engine crawlers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the following codebase for SEO best practices: missing meta tags, slow LCP, and poor semantic HTML structure. Provide a refactor plan.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --target='src/components/layout/SEO.tsx' --rules='Ensure all pages have unique dynamic meta tags and proper schema.org JSON-LD'.

steps.title: Automated Content Clusters
steps.description: Create a pillar-cluster architecture to establish topical authority, which is essential for intermediate SaaS SEO.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a content calendar for 10 blog posts supporting the main keyword [Keyword]. Ensure each post includes internal linking strategy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate Markdown files for the content cluster strategy, including frontmatter for SEO tags'.

steps.title: Schema Markup Injection
steps.description: Implement structured data to earn rich snippets in search results, significantly increasing your click-through rate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a valid Schema.org JSON-LD block for a SaaS product including pricing, features, and aggregate rating.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file='pages/index.tsx' --instruction='Inject the generated JSON-LD schema into the head component'.

steps.title: Performance-Driven Optimization
steps.description: Optimize your build for Core Web Vitals to ensure your site ranks higher in Google’s speed-sensitive algorithm.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review this Next.js configuration and suggest specific code-level optimizations to improve Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS).
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Optimize image loading and font delivery for performance in the current project.'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Problem-Aware' keywords over 'Feature-Aware' keywords to capture users earlier in the sales funnel.
Use Claude Code to automate the generation of alt-text for all product screenshots to boost image search rankings.
Implement a 'Programmatic SEO' page generator for your SaaS to create thousands of location-specific landing pages instantly.
Always include a 'Compare [Your SaaS] vs [Competitor]' page; these often have the highest conversion rates.
Monitor your Google Search Console performance and use Claude Code to re-optimize pages that have impressions but low click-through rates.
content.next_steps: Deploy your optimized landing pages, submit your updated sitemap to Google Search Console, and monitor your keyword rankings over the next 30 days.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your code sit in the dark. Use these tools to build a product that markets itself and watch your organic traffic scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
